subcodes.first_line: O Javad! Upon thee be the glory of God and His loving-kindness! The letter of the Afnán—upon him be My Glory—which he addressed unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد علیک بهاء الله و عنایته مکتوب افنان علیه بهائی که بآنجناب ارسال داشتند
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wisdom [hikmat]
